changes.value:
Plan section 6 requires:
- entity.cut: `menu: { path: [Edit], group: 1, order: 0 }`
- entity.copy: `menu: { path: [Edit], group: 1, order: 1 }`
- entity.paste: `menu: { path: [Edit], group: 1, order: 2 }`

None of these commands have a `menu:` field in `swissarmyhammer-commands/builtin/commands/entity.yaml` (lines 118-155). Without these, Cut/Copy/Paste will NOT appear in the Edit menu. The entire clipboard section of the Edit menu is missing.

Fix: Add `menu:` blocks to entity.cut, entity.copy, and entity.paste in entity.yaml with the specified path/group/order values."
BLOCKER: entity.cut, entity.copy, entity.paste missing menu: field in entity.yaml
